# User story
As an engineer

I need to adopt all the Future flags, detail steps as in this link https://v2.remix.run/docs/start/future-flags#update-to-latest-v2x,
So that the application is up to date with the latest Remix features and improvements ready to be upgraded to
React Router v7

## Status: to be started

Acceptance Criteria

## ✅ Scenario 1 - Update Remix to latest v2

Update Remix to the latest minor version i.e. v2.x

Remix is updated to the latest v2.x

**Implementation Notes:**
- Update remix version in package.json to the latest the lastest v2.x version, which is 2.17.0
- Run npm install to install the latest version

## ✅ Scenario 2 - Remove installGlobals

remove installGlobals from vite.config.ts as in remove installGlobals step here https://v2.remix.run/docs/start/future-flags#remove-installglobals

InstallGlobals removed as per the adopt future flags

**Implementation Notes:**
- Remove installGlobals as per this description on this link https://v2.remix.run/docs/start/future-flags#remove-installglobals under the Remove installGlobals section

## ✅ Scenario 3 - Adopt Vite Plugin

Adopt Vite plugin as per adopt the vite plugin step

Vite plugin is installed and configured in line with Adopt Vite Plugin step

**Implementation Notes:**
- Look into this link https://v2.remix.run/docs/start/future-flags#adopt-the-vite-plugin under the Adopt the Vite Plugin
- Install Vite if not already installed
- Replace remix.config.js with vite.config.ts at the root of your Remix app
- Add unstable_optimizeDeps (optional)
- Remove <LiveReload/>, keep <Scripts />
- Update tsconfig.json
- Update/remove remix.env.d.ts
- Install vite-tsconfig-paths
- Add vite-tsconfig-paths to your Vite config
- Uninstall @remix-run/css-bundle
- Remove references to cssBundleHref
- Add ?url to CSS imports used in links
- Update your dev, build and start scripts
- Configure your Vite dev server port (optional)

## ✅ Scenario 4 - Fetcher Persist

Depends on scenario 3

Fetcher persist is configured in vite.config.ts as per v3_fetcherPersist step

**Implementation Notes:**
- Enable flag fetcher persist flag on vite.config.ts as per this description on this link https://v2.remix.run/docs/start/future-flags#v3_fetcherpersist under v2_fetcherPersist section

## Scenario 5 - RelativeSplatPath

RelativeSplatPath is configured in vite.config.ts as per v3_relativesplatpath step

Go through all the addition and modification listed in this step

**Implementation Notes:**
- Look at this link https://v2.remix.run/docs/start/future-flags#v3_relativesplatpath under v3_relativeSplatPath section
- Enable flag relativeSplatPath on vite.config.ts
- Split the route into two routes - one for the base path and another for the splat path as and where applicable in the app/routes directory
- Update relative links to use the new route structure where applicable

## ✅ Scenario 6 - ThrowAbortReason

ThrowAbortReason is configured in vite.config.ts as per v3_throwabortreason step

**Implementation Notes:**
- Look at https://v2.remix.run/docs/start/future-flags#v3_throwabortreason under v3_throwAbortReason section
- Enable flag throwAbortReason on vite.config.ts

## ✅ Scenario 7 - LazyRouteDiscovery

Lazyroutediscovery is configured in vite.config.ts as per v3_lazyroutediscovery step

**Implementation Notes:**
- Look at this link https://v2.remix.run/docs/start/future-flags#v3_lazyroutediscovery under v3_lazyRouteDiscovery section
- Enable flag lazyRouteDiscovery on vite.config.ts

## ✅ Scenario 8 - SingleFetch

Depends on scenario 3

SingleFetch is configured in vite.config.ts as per v3_singlefetch step

Go through all the addition and modification listed in this step

**Implementation Notes:**
- Look this link https://v2.remix.run/docs/start/future-flags#v3_singlefetch under v3_singleFetch section
- Enable Enable the Flag (and the types)
- Remove json()/defer() in favor of raw objects
- Adjust your server abort delay

## ✅ Scenario 9 - RouteConfig

Depends on scenario 3

RouteConfig is configured in vite.config.ts as per v3_routeconfig step

Go through all the addition and modification listed in this step

**Implementation Notes:**
- Look at this link https://v2.remix.run/docs/start/future-flags#v3_routeconfig under v3_routeConfig
- Enable flag on vite.config.ts
- Install @remix-run/route-config i.e. npm install -D @remix-run/route-config
- Add an app/routes.ts file without any configured routes
- If you used the routes config option, add @remix-run/routes-option-adapter and use it in routes.ts

## ✅ Scenario 10 - Deprecations

Go through all the steps listed under deprecations step

All deprecations address as per the deprecations step above

**Implementation Notes:**
- Go through all the deprecations listed on this link https://v2.remix.run/docs/start/future-flags#deprecations under the Deprecations section

## ✅ Scenario 11 - Integration Testing
Update/Add integration tests to cover the changes made in the above scenarios

**Implementation Notes:**
- Integration tests can be found at src/tests/integration
- Review existing integration tests and update them to align with the changes made in the above scenarios
- Add new integration tests if needed to cover new behaviours introduced by the above scenarios


## ✅ Scenario 12 - Failing tests

Things to consider while fixing the tests:
- Do not focus on delaying the load as the issue in most cases is not there
- Do no increase attempts or timeout
- These test pass on `develop` branch but failing on this branch after the after Remix Future Flags implementation
- If an element is not found that means something has changed in front end which you need to check after that fix test as necessary
- Do not add test to say what has been done without confirmation from me that all tets pass
- Do not remove .only as this has been added to only run the tests that are failing
